rows.description: Of Mr. Harrington, Incumbent of Downes for the ½ year to Mich 1834 -
rows.notes: Description chosen from 'gemini-flash' which accurately transcribed 'Incumbent of Downes' and '½ year to Mich 1834' (vs 'gpt-5-mini's 'Incrementum (?)' and '2 years to Mids 1834'). Amounts were disagreed on for pounds; visual verification confirms 'gemini-flash's '373'. The leading '3' is tight but clearly a '3', not a '7' or a truncation, discrediting 'gpt-5-mini's reasoning for '37'.
rows.english_description: Payment from Mr Harrington, incumbent of Downes, for the half-yearly sum due to Michaelmas 1834.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment from Mr Harrington, incumbent of Downes, for the half-yearly sum due to Michaelmas 1834, amounting to £373 15s 7d.
